<DESCRIPTION>EX-99.1
<TEXT>
<!--Enhanced HTML document created with Toppan Merrill Bridge  11.2.0.21--><!--Created on: 5/20/2026 09:08:53 AM (UTC)--><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title></title></head><body><div style="margin-top:30pt;"></div><div style="max-width:100%;padding-left:10.35%;padding-right:10.35%;position:relative;"><div style="clear:both;max-width:100%;position:relative;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Exhibit 99.1</b></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Operating and Financial Review and Prospects</b></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">First Quarter Ended March 31, 2025 and 2026</b></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:12pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">You should read the following discussion and analysis of our financial condition and results of operations for the three months ended March 31, 2025 and 2026 in conjunction with our unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements and related notes appearing elsewhere in this Report on Form&#160;6-K, as well as our audited consolidated financial statements and the &#8220;Operating and Financial Review and Prospects&#8221; section of our 2025 Annual Report on Form&#160;20-F, filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission on April&#160;30, 2026. In addition to historical information, this discussion contains forward-looking statements based on our current expectations that involve risks, uncertainties and assumptions. Our actual results may differ materially from those anticipated in these forward-looking statements as a result of various factors, including those set forth in the &#8220;Risk Factors&#8221; and &#8220;Forward-Looking Statements&#8221; sections of our 2025 Annual Report.</i> <i style="font-style:italic;">The historical results described below relate to the results of our continuing operations.</i></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;padding-bottom:6pt;margin:12pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Overview</b></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;background:#ffffff;margin:0pt 0pt 8pt 0pt;"><a name="_Hlk65162883"></a>Nebius, a global AI cloud platform, delivers a unified full-stack AI cloud that spans the complete AI journey &#8211; from compute capacity to software and services &#8211; that enables fast and efficient training and inference at scale. Founded around deep in-house technological expertise, Nebius offers a comprehensive and integrated suite of AI and ML cloud solutions, including both hardware and software built in-house. This combination of AI-optimized hardware and software enables us to deliver high-performance GPU compute clusters, storage, managed services, and advanced tools for AI model training and inference at enterprise-scale.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt;">Headquartered in Amsterdam and listed on Nasdaq, Nebius Group N.V., the parent company (the &#8220;Company&#8221;), together with its consolidated subsidiaries (collectively &#8220;Nebius Group&#8221; or the &#8220;Group&#8221;), offers one of the few global, at scale, multi-tenant clouds purpose-built for AI, with a significant presence in Europe, the U.S., and other geographies around the world. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Nebius Group includes Nebius as well as two distinct businesses that operate under separate brands: Avride, a leading developer of autonomous vehicles and delivery robots; and TripleTen, a leading edtech platform focused on reskilling people for careers in tech. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Nebius Group also owns significant equity stakes in ClickHouse and Toloka, both of which were previously spun out of the Group.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">A detailed description of our business and key trends impacting our results of operations is contained in the &#8220;Operating and Financial Review and Prospects&#8221; section of our 2025 Annual Report.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:12pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Operating Segments </b></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Our primary business, Nebius, delivers a unified full-stack AI cloud platform that spans the complete AI journey &#8211; from compute capacity to software and services that enable fast and efficient AI application deployment and inference at scale. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">In addition to our Nebius AI cloud business, Nebius Group also holds two distinct businesses that operate under separate brands:</p><table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse:collapse;font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin-bottom:0pt;margin-top:0pt;table-layout:fixed;width:100%;border:0pt;"><tr><td style="width:56.7pt;"></td><td style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;vertical-align:text-top;white-space:nowrap;width:21.25pt;padding:0pt;">&#9679;</td><td style="padding:0pt;"><font style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;">Avride &#8211; a developer of autonomous driving technology for self-driving vehicles and delivery robotics.</font></td></tr></table><table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse:collapse;font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin-bottom:0pt;margin-top:0pt;table-layout:fixed;width:100%;border:0pt;"><tr><td style="width:56.7pt;"></td><td style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;vertical-align:text-top;white-space:nowrap;width:21.25pt;padding:0pt;">&#9679;</td><td style="padding:0pt;"><font style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;">TripleTen &#8211; a leading edtech platform focused on re-skilling individuals for careers in technology.</font></td></tr></table></div><div style="clear:both;display:table;margin-bottom:27.35pt;min-height:36pt;width:100%;"><div style="display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:24pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;">1</p></div></div></div><hr style="background-color:#000000;clear:both;color:#000000;height:2pt;line-height:0;margin-bottom:30pt;margin-left:10.35%;margin-right:10.35%;margin-top:30pt;page-break-after:always;width:79.3%;border-width:0;"><div style="max-width:100%;padding-left:10.35%;padding-right:10.35%;position:relative;"><div style="clear:both;max-width:100%;position:relative;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Components of Results of Operations</b></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Revenue</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:justify;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Our Nebius AI cloud business generates revenue by providing our customers with a comprehensive and integrated AI cloud platform, underpinned by high-performance GPU compute capacity, storage, and networking resources, as well as value-add software solutions. The Nebius AI cloud business is designed to support the entire AI lifecycle - from building and deploying AI models, to managing large-scale AI applications and producing inference tokens. Revenue from the cloud platform is recognized as services are provided in accordance with customer contract due dates and the applicable contract model. We offer both on-demand &#8220;pay-as-you-go&#8221; pricing and fixed &#8220;reserved capacity&#8221; contracts.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:justify;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">TripleTen generates revenue from educational services to individual customers (students) through boot camps and project-based learning opportunities by providing online educational products.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Avride has made only a limited contribution to the total revenue to date.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Operating costs and expenses</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">We classify operating costs and expenses as follows: cost of revenues; product development; sales, general and administrative; and depreciation and amortization.<font style="color:#806000;"> </font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Cost of Revenues</i></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Cost of revenues primarily consists of costs of operation and co-location of data center facilities, electricity, utility and maintenance costs in data centers, personnel costs, payment processing and students&#8217; tuition fees and other related expenses. The Group&#8217;s owned Finland data center together with rented data center facilities and co-location agreements are significant components of the Group&#8217;s cost of revenues.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Product development</i></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Product development expenses consist primarily of personnel costs, including share-based compensation expenses, incurred for the development of, enhancement to and maintenance of the Group&#8217;s technology platforms, from infrastructure to software. Product development expenses also include rent and utilities attributable to office spaces occupied by development staff. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Sales, general and administrative</i></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;">Sales, general and administrative expenses include expenses for personnel engaged in sales and promotion of products to the market, or performing general or administrative functions, including share-based compensation expenses; rental of office space and related utilities in proportion to the number of employees performing these functions; training and hiring expenses; advertising and marketing expenses, including the costs of organizing promotions; legal and audit services; and other expenses related to the Group&#8217;s wider operating activities.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Depreciation and amortization</i></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;">Depreciation and amortization expenses relate to the depreciation of property and equipment, mainly servers and networking equipment, data center related infrastructure equipment and office furniture, and the amortization of intangible assets.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Share-based compensation </i></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">In the consolidated statements of operations, share-based compensation expense is recorded in the same functional area as the expense for the recipient&#8217;s cash compensation. As a result, share-based compensation expense is allocated among the cost of revenues; product development expenses; and sales, general and administrative expenses.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Interest income</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Interest income is mainly generated from short-term bank deposits and cash account balances.</p></div><div style="clear:both;display:table;margin-bottom:27.35pt;min-height:36pt;width:100%;"><div style="display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:24pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;">2</p></div></div></div><hr style="background-color:#000000;clear:both;color:#000000;height:2pt;line-height:0;margin-bottom:30pt;margin-left:10.35%;margin-right:10.35%;margin-top:30pt;page-break-after:always;width:79.3%;border-width:0;"><div style="max-width:100%;padding-left:10.35%;padding-right:10.35%;position:relative;"><div style="clear:both;max-width:100%;position:relative;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Interest expense</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Interest expense primarily consists of contractual interest and the amortization of debt discounts and issuance costs associated with our outstanding debt obligations. It also includes interest accretion related to significant financing components arising from differences between the timing of the transfer of goods or services to customers and the timing of customer payments. Interest expense is reflected net of capitalized interest.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Gain from revaluation of investments in equity securities</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Gain from revaluation of investments in equity securities includes primarily the remeasurement of our investment in ClickHouse, following a third-party investment in that company.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Income / (loss) from equity method investments</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Income / (loss) from equity method investments includes the results of Toloka, which was deconsolidated in the second quarter of 2025 and subsequently accounted for under the equity method, and minor stakes in venture capital funds. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Other income, net</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Other income, net consists of gains from investments in money market funds and foreign exchange gains and losses. Dynamics of foreign exchange gains and losses reflect changes in the U.S. dollar value (the Group&#8217;s reporting currency) of monetary assets and liabilities that are denominated in other currencies (primarily the euro), as well as changes in the functional currencies of foreign subsidiaries&#39; monetary assets and liabilities that are denominated in currencies different from their respective local currencies.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Results of Operations</b></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;">Comparative financial information appearing elsewhere in this report has been recast to reflect the results of Toloka within discontinued operations. The following table presents our historical consolidated results of continuing operations for the periods indicated:</p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:98.36%;"><tr style="height:1pt;"><td Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;">Cost of revenues</p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:3.62%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 24.7</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:3.62%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:14.14%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 103.8</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:bottom;width:64.49%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;">Product development</p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:3.62%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.11%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 36.5</font></p></td><td from continuing operations</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:3.62%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New (104.3)</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:3.62%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font 621.2</b></p></td></tr></table></div><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:12pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;">Net income from continuing operations was $621.2 million in the first quarter of 2026, compared with a net loss of $104.3 million in the comparative period in 2025, primarily due to the gain from the revaluation of our investment in ClickHouse. Loss from operations increased moderately from $120.3 million to $128.0 million. </p></div><div style="clear:both;display:table;margin-bottom:27.35pt;min-height:36pt;width:100%;"><div style="display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:24pt 0pt 0pt style="font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.42%;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.69%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.42%;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:8pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">2026</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:3.69%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.42%;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:8pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">2025 to 2026</b></p></td><td style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.42%;background:#cceeff;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="vertical-align:middle;width:3.67%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;">%</p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:41.95%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;">      Total revenues</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:3.69%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.42%;border-bottom:3px double #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 50.9</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.69%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.42%;border-bottom:3px double #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 399.0</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:3.69%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.42%;border-bottom:3px double #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 684</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:3.67%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;">%</p></td></tr></table></div><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Eliminations represent the elimination of transactions between the operating segments, including use of our Nebius cloud platform by other segments within the Group.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Revenues by operating segment:</i></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Total revenues increased by $348.1 million, or 684%, from $50.9 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $399.0 million in the first quarter of 2026. This increase was predominantly driven by the revenues generated by our AI cloud business, Nebius.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Revenues for the Nebius AI cloud business grew by $348.3 million, from $41.4 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $389.7 million in the first quarter of 2026. Growth was driven by capacity scaling and supported by strong pricing and utilization.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Revenues from TripleTen grew by $1.1 million, or 10%, from $10.5 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $11.6 million in the first quarter of 2026, driven primarily by approximately 5,000 new student enrollments.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;">The Avride business had only a limited contribution to the total revenue for the Group.            </font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;padding-left:18pt;text-indent:-18pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 36pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Operating </font><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">c</font><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">osts and </font><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">e</font><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">xpenses</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Cost of revenues</i> </p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:100%;"><tr style="font-size:8pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td colspan="3" style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:30.78%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:8pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">(in&#160;millions&#160;of U.S. dollars)</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;">Cost of revenues </p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 24.7</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;">&#160;</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 103.8</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">as a percentage of revenues</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 49</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 26</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">as a percentage of operating expenses</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 14</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 20</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td></tr></table></div><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Cost of revenues increased by $79.1 million, or 320%, from $24.7 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $103.8 million in the first quarter of 2026. The increase was due to the expansion of our Nebius AI cloud business, with expenses incurred for co-location and operating lease agreements as well as hiring to support our growing operations. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">As a percentage of revenue, cost of revenues was 26% in the first quarter of 2026, down from 49% in the first quarter of 2025, primarily reflecting operating leverage as we scaled capacity. As a percentage of total operating expenses, cost of revenues increased from 14% in the first quarter of 2025 to 20% in the first quarter of 2026, reflecting the continued scaling of our AI cloud business. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Avride and TripleTen had a limited contribution to the overall increase in cost of revenues. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Product development </i></p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:100%;"><tr style="height:1pt;"><td Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;">&#160;</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td percentage of operating expenses</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 21</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 13</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td></tr></table></div></div><div style="clear:both;display:table;margin-bottom:27.35pt;min-height:36pt;width:100%;"><div style="display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:24pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;">4</p></div></div></div><hr style="background-color:#000000;clear:both;color:#000000;height:2pt;line-height:0;margin-bottom:30pt;margin-left:10.35%;margin-right:10.35%;margin-top:30pt;page-break-after:always;width:79.3%;border-width:0;"><div style="max-width:100%;padding-left:10.35%;padding-right:10.35%;position:relative;"><div style="clear:both;max-width:100%;position:relative;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:0pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Product development expenses increased by $30.9 million, or 85%, from $36.5 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $67.4 million in the first quarter of 2026. The increase was primarily driven by hiring in our engineering and development teams to build and enhance our product offerings.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">As a percentage of total operating expenses, product development expenses decreased from 21% in the first quarter of 2025 to 13% in the first quarter of 2026, reflecting operating leverage and a faster growth rate in other expense categories, particularly those related to scaling infrastructure.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Sales, general and administrative</i><a name="_Hlk127952711"></a> </p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:100%;"><tr style="height:1pt;"><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><div style="height:1pt;overflow:hidden;overflow-wrap:break-word;position:relative;"><div style="position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translate(0,-50%);width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:1pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></div></div></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><div style="height:1pt;overflow:hidden;overflow-wrap:break-word;position:relative;"><div style="position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translate(0,-50%);width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:1pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></div></div></td><td style="font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style="height:0pt;visibility:hidden;"><td colspan="6" style="padding:0pt;"></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td colspan="3" style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:30.78%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:8pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">(in&#160;millions&#160;of U.S. dollars)</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;">Sales, general and administrative expenses</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;">60.9</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;">&#160;</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;">143.8</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">as a percentage of operating expenses</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 36</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 27</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td></tr></table></div><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-size:1pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Sales, general and administrative expenses increased by $82.9 million, or 136%, from $60.9 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $143.8 million in the first quarter of 2026. This increase was primarily driven by a $26.3 million increase in personnel-related expenses, primarily reflecting higher salary expense and related costs associated with increased headcount, a $17.6 million increase in consulting, legal and other professional fees, a $12.1 million increase in share-based compensation expense allocated to personnel engaged in sales, general and administrative activities, a $16.8 million increase in taxes other than income taxes, and a $10.1 million increase in other expenses.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">As a percentage of total operating expenses, sales, general and administrative expenses decreased from 36% in the first quarter of 2025 to 27% in the first quarter of 2026, reflecting operating leverage as other cost categories, particularly depreciation and infrastructure-related expenses, grew at a faster pace. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Depreciation and amortization</i></p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:100%;"><tr style="height:1pt;"><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><div style="height:1pt;overflow:hidden;overflow-wrap:break-word;position:relative;"><div style="position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translate(0,-50%);width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:1pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></div></div></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><div style="font-size:8pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:8pt;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">&#160;&#160;&#8203;&#160;&#8203;&#160;&#8203;</b></p></td><td colspan="3" style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:30.78%;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style="height:0pt;visibility:hidden;"><td colspan="6" style="padding:0pt;"></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:30.78%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:8pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">(in&#160;millions&#160;of U.S. dollars)</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:8pt;font-weight:bold;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;">Depreciation and amortization expenses</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 49.1</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 212.0</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">as a percentage of operating expenses</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 29</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 40</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td></tr></table></div><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Depreciation and amortization expenses increased by <a name="_Hlk127952767"></a>$162.9 million, or 332%, from $49.1 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $212.0 million in the first quarter of 2026. The primary driver of the increase in depreciation and amortization expenses was the continued investments in GPU-related capital expenditures and related data center hardware for the Nebius AI cloud business. Starting the first quarter of 2026, we revised the useful life for our server and network equipment from four years to five years to reflect usage patterns and current utilization commitments. The change in accounting estimate has been applied prospectively from 2026.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">As a percentage of total operating expenses, depreciation and amortization increased from 29% in the first quarter of 2025 to 40% in the first quarter of 2026, highlighting the growing capital intensity of our infrastructure operations.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">Share-based compensation</i></p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:100%;"><tr style="height:1pt;"><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><div style="height:1pt;overflow:hidden;overflow-wrap:break-word;position:relative;"><div style="position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translate(0,-50%);width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><a name="_Hlk65245318"></a><font style="font-size:1pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></div></div></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><div style="height:1pt;overflow:hidden;overflow-wrap:break-word;position:relative;"><div style="position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translate(0,-50%);width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-size:1pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></div></div></td><td expense included within:</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;">&#8239;&#160;</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;">     Cost of revenues </font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 0.2</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;">     Product development </font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 6.3</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 11.7</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;">     Sales, general and administrative expenses</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 11.0</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 23.0</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Total share</b><b style="font-weight:bold;">&#8209;</b><b style="font-weight:bold;">based compensation expense</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;border-bottom:3px double #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 17.5</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;background:#cceeff;border-bottom:3px double #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 35.3</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:62.22%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">as a percentage of operating expenses</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 10</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:13.64%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 7</i></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.48%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><i style="font-style:italic;">%</i></p></td></tr></table></div><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Share-based compensation expense increased by $17.8&#160;million, or 102%, from $17.5 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $35.3 million in the first quarter of 2026. The growth was primarily due to the grants of share options in the second quarter of 2025 to the Group&#8217;s senior management, as well as higher grant date fair value of recently issued RSU grants. </p></div><div style="clear:both;display:table;margin-bottom:27.35pt;min-height:36pt;width:100%;"><div style="display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:24pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;">5</p></div></div></div><hr style="background-color:#000000;clear:both;color:#000000;height:2pt;line-height:0;margin-bottom:30pt;margin-left:10.35%;margin-right:10.35%;margin-top:30pt;page-break-after:always;width:79.3%;border-width:0;"><div style="max-width:100%;padding-left:10.35%;padding-right:10.35%;position:relative;"><div style="clear:both;max-width:100%;position:relative;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;padding-left:18pt;text-indent:-18pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 36pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Interest income</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;">Interest income increased by $5.7&#160;million, or 67%, from $8.5 million in the first quarter of 2025 to $14.2 million in the first quarter of 2026. The increase was primarily driven by higher cash balances following funds raised through various debt instruments, a substantial portion of which was invested in highly liquid, interest-bearing financial instruments.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Interest expense</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Interest expense was nil and $63.7 million in the first quarter of 2025 and 2026, respectively. The interest expense in 2026 is primarily attributable to convertible notes issued by the Company in June 2025, September 2025 and March 2026.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">See Note 12 &#8212; &#8220;Convertible debt&#8221; of our unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this Report on Form 6-K.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:24pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Gain from revaluation of investment in equity securities</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:24pt;margin:0pt 0pt 0pt 12pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;margin-left:0pt;visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt;">Gain from revaluation of investments in equity securities was $780.6 million in the first quarter of 2026, attributable to the remeasurement of our investments in ClickHouse Inc. based on observable price changes from ClickHouse&#8217;s January 2026 Series D preferred stock financing (the &#8220;Series D Financing&#8221;), which raised $400 million at a reported valuation of approximately $15 billion. The Series D Financing represented an orderly transaction involving equity securities of the same issuer that are similar to our investment.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">See Note 5 &#8212; &#8220;<i style="font-style:italic;">Investments in equity securities and equity method investments</i><i style="font-style:italic;">&#8221; </i>of our unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this Report on Form&#160;6-K.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Income / (loss) from equity method investments</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Loss from equity method investments in the amount of $7.6 million in the first quarter of 2026 primarily reflects a loss related to our remaining stake in Toloka, which was deconsolidated in the second quarter of 2025 and subsequently accounted for under the equity method.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">See Note 5 &#8212; &#8220;<i style="font-style:italic;">Investments in equity securities and equity method investments</i><i style="font-style:italic;">&#8221; </i>of our unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this Report on Form&#160;6-K.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Other income, net </font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">The following table presents the components of other income, net in absolute terms for the periods presented:</p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:100%;"><tr (loss)</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.61%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.61%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.11%;background:#cceeff;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 0.6</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.61%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;width:14.13%;background:#cceeff;border-bottom:1px solid #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> 0.9</font></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:64.51%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">Total other income, net</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.61%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.11%;border-bottom:3px double #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 8.3</b></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.61%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.13%;border-bottom:3px double #000000;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt 3.5pt 0pt 0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;white-space:pre-wrap;"> 19.9</b></p></td></tr></table></div><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">Other income, net was $8.3 million and $19.9 million for the first quarter of 2025 and 2026, respectively. The increase was primarily due to the higher gains from investments in money market funds resulting from higher average balances invested in such funds, as well as favorable movements in currency exchange rates during the first quarter of 2026. </p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;">The functional currency of Nebius Group N.V. is the U.S. dollar, which is also the Group&#8217;s reporting currency. Foreign exchange gains and losses reflect changes in the U.S. dollar value of the Group&#8217;s monetary assets and liabilities denominated in foreign currencies (primarily the euro), as well as remeasurement effects in subsidiaries with non-U.S. dollar functional currencies.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:36pt;margin:0pt 0pt 12pt 0pt;"><font style="font-style:italic;font-weight:bold;">Adjusted EBITDA / (loss) by operating segments</font></p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;"><font style="display:inline-block;text-indent:0pt;width:0.55pt;"></font>Our management uses Adjusted EBITDA / (loss) as a financial measure of performance of our businesses. Adjusted EBITDA / (loss) means U.S. GAAP net income / (loss) from continuing operations before (1) depreciation and </p></div><div style="clear:both;display:table;margin-bottom:27.35pt;min-height:36pt;width:100%;"><div style="display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;width:100%;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:center;margin:24pt 0pt 0pt 0pt;">6</p></div></div></div><hr style="background-color:#000000;clear:both;color:#000000;height:2pt;line-height:0;margin-bottom:30pt;margin-left:10.35%;margin-right:10.35%;margin-top:30pt;page-break-after:always;width:79.3%;border-width:0;"><div style="max-width:100%;padding-left:10.35%;padding-right:10.35%;position:relative;"><div style="clear:both;max-width:100%;position:relative;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;">amortization, (2) SBC expense, (3) one-off restructuring and other expenses, (4) interest income, (5) interest expense, (6) income / (loss) from equity method investments, (7) gain from revaluation of investments in equity securities, (8) other income / (loss), net, (9) income tax expense / (benefit). For a reconciliation between total Adjusted EBITDA / (loss) and net income / (loss) before income taxes see Note 15 &#8212; &#8220;Information about segments &amp; geographic areas&#8221; of our condensed consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this Report on Form 6-K.</p><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-indent:35.45pt;margin:6pt 0pt 6pt 0pt;"><font style="display:inline-block;text-indent:0pt;width:0.55pt;"></font>The table below presents information about the Adjusted EBITDA (loss) of the operating segments:</p><div align="left"><table style="border-collapse:collapse;font-size:16pt;height:max-content;padding-left:0pt;padding-right:0pt;width:100%;"><tr style="height:1pt;"><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:64.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><div style="height:1pt;overflow:hidden;overflow-wrap:break-word;position:relative;"><div 31,</b></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:64.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="height:0pt;visibility:hidden;"><td colspan="5" style="padding:0pt;"></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:64.5%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:8pt;text-align:center;margin:0pt;"><b style="font-weight:bold;">(in&#160;millions&#160;of U.S. dollars)</b></p></td></tr><tr style=""><td style="vertical-align:middle;width:64.5%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;">Nebius&#160;AI cloud</p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.62%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.13%;background:#cceeff;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.62%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;text-align:right;margin:0pt;"><font style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> (16.9)</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:3.61%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New Roman','Times','serif';font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;"><font style="visibility:hidden;">&#8203;</font></p></td><td style="vertical-align:middle;white-space:nowrap;width:14.13%;margin:0pt;padding:0pt;"><p style="font-family:'Times New
